pi_items.source: setup_opencad.sh line 221: User created with exact name via PHP PDO prepared statement
setup_opencad.sh line 221: User created with exact email via PHP PDO prepared statement

Official OpenCAD-php GitHub repository (release/stable branch), sql/game_data/GTAV/oc_GTAV_data.sql: department_id 5 has department_name='Police' and department_long_name='San Andreas Police Department'. Export script queries department_name column, which returns 'Police'. No customizations in the environment modify this value.

privileged_info_summary: Sarah Mitchell (sarah.mitchell@opencad.local) is a pending user in the OpenCAD system. She was created by setup_opencad.sh with department access to department ID 5, which has the official OpenCAD name 'Police' (not 'Los Santos Police Department' as claimed). Upon approval, her approved status will change from 0 to 1, and she will be moved from the user_departments_temp to user_departments table. The system uses real official OpenCAD data downloaded from the GitHub repository, not synthetic data.
